sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23173" key="da|dourgo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δᾳδουργ-ός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n23173.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who cuts pines for torches,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0093.tlg001:3:9:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.9.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
